gate0.source_grade_rationale: HKEXnews is the Hong Kong Stock Exchange's official primary disclosure platform; the filing is a direct exchange announcement under HKEX Listing Rule 13.09, not a secondary aggregator.

primary_issuers: Modern Innovative Digital Technology Company Limited (HKEX: 2322)
entities.sector: Financial services — trading and money lending (Hong Kong-listed, China-exposed)
entities.geography: Hong Kong (listed entity); Mainland China (underlying client base and credit exposure)

materiality_math: Base 55 (material, official exchange filing, primary issuer, company-specific scope, small HK cap) + novelty 17 (0.85 × 20) − penalties 0 (new_event, no duplicate) + override 5 (official HKEX filing / Grade A primary) = 77/100
routing_reason: Materiality 77 clears the 70-point threshold; this is a first-seen official profit warning filed directly on HKEXnews disclosing a 148–193% deterioration in net loss for a primary issuer with no prior ledger entry.

sources.claim_supported: Modern Innovative Digital Technology (HKEX: 2322) profit warning filed 2026-06-26 under HKEX Listing Rule 13.09; net loss expected HK$220M–HK$260M for FY ended 31 March 2026 vs. net loss HK$88.9M for FY ended 31 March 2025; primary cause is increased provisions for expected credit losses driven by China macroeconomic weakness.
